# Hans Lacida

> Paid Acquisition Systems Operator specializing in Google Ads,
> Performance Max, and tracking infrastructure. Based in the
> Philippines. Helps ecommerce, healthcare, B2B SaaS, and
> high-CPC verticals build acquisition systems that compound.

## Services
- [Google Ads Audit & Restructure](https://hanslacida.com/services/audit): Full campaign architecture review, signal optimization, and fix plan for underperforming accounts.
- [Performance Max Management](https://hanslacida.com/services/pmax): PMax structuring that works with AI bidding, not against it — asset groups, audience signals, and budget controls.
- [Tracking & Measurement Setup](https://hanslacida.com/services/tracking): Server-side tagging, GA4 configuration, enhanced conversions, and offline conversion import (OCI).
- [First-Party Data Strategy](https://hanslacida.com/services/first-party-data): Customer Match activation, consent mode, and CRM-to-Google Ads integration.

## Vertical Expertise
- [Ecommerce & Shopping](https://hanslacida.com/verticals/ecommerce): Google Shopping, PMax asset groups, feed optimization, and seasonal scaling.
- [Healthcare & MedSpa](https://hanslacida.com/verticals/healthcare): HIPAA-compliant campaign structure, lead quality tracking, compliance-safe targeting.
- [B2B SaaS](https://hanslacida.com/verticals/b2b-saas): Pipeline attribution, long sales cycle tracking, CRM integration.
- [Legal, Finance & Home Services](https://hanslacida.com/verticals/high-cpc): High-intent search, local service ads, aggressive CPA management.

## Resources & Writing
- [Blog](https://hanslacida.com/blog): Practical breakdowns of Google Ads strategy, PMax architecture, and tracking systems.
- [Case Studies](https://hanslacida.com/case-studies): Real account results across ecommerce, healthcare, and B2B verticals.

## Connect
- [Work With Hans](https://hanslacida.com/contact): Inquiry form for audits, restructures, and ongoing management.
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/hanslacida): Professional updates and paid acquisition insights.
